codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/register'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    json={
      "email": "auth-test-1780520743284@example.com",
      "password": "TestPassword1"
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

)

    }
)

print(data)
